changelog.1.6.2: Added build-in Payphones; YPhone apps redesign.
changelog.1.6.3: Added support for slot games. Fixed several UI crash issues.
changelog.1.6.4: Smoother notifications and lock screen fixes, plus YPay search, Instashots and contact bugfixes, and small performance tweaks.
changelog.1.7.0: New Apps -> SpopFinder(game), Voice Recorder, Browser, Lookup(moderation). Make home screen folders and more UI redesigns.
changelog.2.0.0: Widgets and lock screen customization, welcome setup, gallery/maps/messages/notes/calculator/groups/banking UI refreshes, YouToo player and playlists, Fivemanage v3.
changelog.2.0.1: Home screen and widget overlap fix, Darkchat open crash fix, camera mic while recording video.
changelog.2.1.0: Gallery recycle bin & PIN-protected private albums, Garage organize/filters, message blocking, battery & notification fixes, plus UI polish across Phone, YFlip, and social apps.
